summary: Completed comprehensive re-testing of FitViz promotional website after branding update. Perfect brand guideline compliance achieved with 100% functionality across all features.
passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (9/9): health check, contact submission, demo requests, status checks
Brand guidelines compliance: Volt Green (#C8FF00) primary color perfectly implemented
Inter font properly loaded and displayed
Hero section with volt green CTA buttons and dashboard preview
Navigation menu smooth scrolling to all sections
Features bento grid with proper styling and interactive elements
Pricing section with volt green Pro card glow and annual/monthly toggle
Testimonials section with 4 customer review cards
Contact form with volt green submit button and backend integration
Contact form validation and success message ('Message Sent!')
Footer with correct branding and scroll-to-top functionality
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu
All data-testid attributes working for automated testing

success_percentage.integration: 100% (Contact form to backend API working seamlessly)
